bridge-type.label: Jellyfin Server
bridge-type.description: Represents a running Jellyfin server instance

parameter.name: serverName
parameter.label: Server Name
parameter.description: Human-readable name for the server (auto-discovered from server if not set)

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname/IP
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the server

parameter.name: refreshSeconds
parameter.label: Refresh Seconds
parameter.description: Interval to pull devices state from the server

parameter-group.name: clientDiscoveryFilters
parameter-group.label: Client Discovery Filters
parameter-group.description:
Enable or disable automatic discovery for specific Jellyfin client categories.
The category is determined by the client application name as reported to the Jellyfin server.
Note: These settings only affect the openHAB Inbox; they do not remove already-discovered things.

parameter.name: discoverWebClients
parameter.label: Discover Web Clients
parameter.description:
Discover Jellyfin Web clients.
Matches clients reporting as: Jellyfin Web

parameter.name: discoverAndroidClients
parameter.label: Discover Android Clients
parameter.description:
Discover Jellyfin Android clients.
Matches clients reporting as: Jellyfin for Android

parameter.name: discoverAndroidTvClients
parameter.label: Discover Android TV Clients
parameter.description:
Discover Jellyfin Android TV clients.
Matches clients reporting as: Jellyfin for Android TV

parameter.name: discoverIosClients
parameter.label: Discover iOS Clients
parameter.description:
Discover iOS clients.
Matches clients reporting as: Jellyfin iOS, Swiftfin, Infuse

parameter.name: discoverKodiClients
parameter.label: Discover Kodi Clients
parameter.description:
Discover Kodi clients.
Matches clients reporting as: JellyCon, Jellyfin for Kodi

parameter.name: discoverRokuClients
parameter.label: Discover Roku Clients
parameter.description:
Discover Roku clients.
Matches clients reporting as: Jellyfin for Roku

parameter.name: discoverOtherClients
parameter.label: Discover Other Clients
parameter.description: Discover third-party clients not matched by any other category above.
